texto: What happens when someone breaks your heart? When someone breaks your heart, first you are shocked. Someone will say you are heartbroken and you examine the words break and heart and heartbroken and you immediately decide that it's inaccurate. You feel pain in the region of your heart and you think it's your heart breaking but one's heart doesn't really break, something else does - faith. You stop believing.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de M.D. Balangue que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “What happens when someone breaks your heart? When someone breaks your heart, first you are shocke…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, faith, heartbreak, com foco em estudos e heartbreak.

frase_original: What happens when someone breaks your heart? When someone breaks your heart, first you are shocked. Someone will say you are heartbroken and you examine the words break and heart and heartbroken and you immediately decide that it's inaccurate. You feel pain in the region of your heart and you think it's your heart breaking but one's heart doesn't really break, something else does - faith. You stop believing.
